title: Pam's Poke Colonies
description: This modpack offers a unique Minecraft experience centered around Cobblemon and MineColonies. Catch and train your very own Cobblemon team, then challenge friends or wild Cobblemon to epic battles!
body:
Catch, Train, Battle, and Build in this Cobblemon & MineColonies Adventure!
This modpack offers a unique Minecraft experience centered around Cobblemon and MineColonies. Catch and train your very own Cobblemon team, then challenge friends or wild Cobblemon to epic battles!

Build and manage your own colony with MineColonies! Hire colonists, assign them tasks, and watch your settlement flourish.

Explore a richly-generated world filled with dungeons, structures, and diverse biomes. Utilize immersive tech mods to automate tasks and build complex machines. Quality-of-life improvements enhance your gameplay experience.

This pack is perfect for trainers and builders alike!  Dive in and start your Cobblemon and MineColonies journey today!
